title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at United India Insurance - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at United India Insurance - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Risk Analyst with drive and ambition, United India Insurance in Kolkata is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About United India Insurance:
United India Insurance is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Ind AS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with United India Insurance!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
